'''âng-s-ch''' ('''kangasach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knobble|knobble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-s-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knobble|knobble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-s-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kangasach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingasach|thingasach]] || [[word:jingasach|jingasach]] || [[word:shingasach|shingasach]] || [[word:kingasach|kingasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungasach|thuthungasach]] || [[word:jujungasach|jujungasach]] || [[word:shushungasach|shushungasach]] || [[word:kukungasach|kukungasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungasach|thungasach]] || [[word:jungasach|jungasach]] || [[word:shungasach|shungasach]] || [[word:kungasach|kungasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungasach|thungasach]] || [[word:jungasach|jungasach]] || [[word:shungasach|shungasach]] || [[word:kungasach|kungasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengasach|thengasach]] || [[word:jengasach|jengasach]] || [[word:shengasach|shengasach]] || [[word:kengasach|kengasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongasach|thothongasach]] || [[word:jojongasach|jojongasach]] || [[word:shoshongasach|shoshongasach]] || [[word:kokongasach|kokongasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongasach|thongasach]] || [[word:jongasach|jongasach]] || [[word:shongasach|shongasach]] || [[word:kongasach|kongasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongasach|thongasach]] || [[word:jongasach|jongasach]] || [[word:shongasach|shongasach]] || [[word:kongasach|kongasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngasach|thĂŠngasach]] || [[word:jĂŠngasach|jĂŠngasach]] || [[word:shĂŠngasach|shĂŠngasach]] || [[word:kĂŠngasach|kĂŠngasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangasach|thathangasach]] || [[word:jajangasach|jajangasach]] || [[word:shashangasach|shashangasach]] || [[word:kakangasach|kakangasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangasach|thangasach]] || [[word:jangasach|jangasach]] || [[word:shangasach|shangasach]] || [[word:kangasach|kangasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangasach|thangasach]] || [[word:jangasach|jangasach]] || [[word:shangasach|shangasach]] || [[word:kangasach|kangasach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangasach|shangasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangasach|goshangasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangasach|gokishangasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangasachnĂŒ|shangasachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangasachnknĂŒ|goshangasachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasachnĂŒ|gokishangasachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangasachshĂ«|shangasachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangasachnkshĂ«|goshangasachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangasachshĂ«|gokishangasachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasachro|shangasachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasachnkro|goshangasachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasachro|gokishangasachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasachmu|shangasachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasachnkmu|goshangasachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasachmu|gokishangasachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangasachsher|shangasachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangasachnksher|goshangasachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangasachsher|gokishangasachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangasachng|shangasachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangasachnkng|goshangasachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangasachng|gokishangasachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangasachya|shangasachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangasachnkya|goshangasachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangasachya|gokishangasachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangasachyam|shangasachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangasachnkyam|goshangasachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangasachyam|gokishangasachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangasachnĂŒshĂ«|shangasachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangasachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangasachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangasachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangasachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasachnĂŒro|shangasachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasachnknĂŒro|goshangasachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasachnĂŒro|gokishangasachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasachnĂŒmu|shangasachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasachnknĂŒmu|goshangasachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasachnĂŒmu|gokishangasachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangasachshĂ«nĂŒ|shangasachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangasachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangasachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangasachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasachshĂ«ro|shangasachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasachnkshĂ«ro|goshangasachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasachshĂ«ro|gokishangasachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasachshĂ«mu|shangasachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasachnkshĂ«mu|goshangasachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasachshĂ«mu|gokishangasachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangasachronĂŒ|shangasachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangasachnkronĂŒ|goshangasachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasachronĂŒ|gokishangasachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangasachroshĂ«|shangasachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangasachnkroshĂ«|goshangasachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangasachroshĂ«|gokishangasachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasachromu|shangasachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasachnkromu|goshangasachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasachromu|gokishangasachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangasachmunĂŒ|shangasachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangasachnkmunĂŒ|goshangasachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasachmunĂŒ|gokishangasachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangasachmushĂ«|shangasachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangasachnkmushĂ«|goshangasachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangasachmushĂ«|gokishangasachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasachmuro|shangasachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasachnkmuro|goshangasachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasachmuro|gokishangasachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
